captions.text: Congratulations on making it this far.
You've learned how to use Claude Code
to explore, test, refactor, and debug code bases.
You can make the best out of Claude Code
when you give it clear instructions,
and point it to the relevant files in your codebase.
Make sure to add your codebase rules to CLAUDE.md
and any information that you'd like
Claude Code to remember about your project.
and connecting it to MCP servers like Playwright and Figma.
Thank you for joining me on this journey.
and I can't wait to see what you'll build with Claude Code.
